---
title: "Model Estimation without Share Data"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
# output: github_document
#     # toc: true
#     # toc_float: true
# always_allow_html: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8)
```

```{r, include = F}

type = "html" # regression output

library(magrittr)
library(ggpubr)
library(stargazer)
library(lfe)
library(gmm)
library(nleqslv)
source("../R/gmm_estimation.R")
source("../R/computing_equilibrium.R")

```


```{r}
load("../output/share_data.RData")
worktype_description <- readxl::read_excel("../output/worktype_description.xlsx") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(description = factor(description,
                                     levels = description))
```




```{r}


x_names <- share_data %>% 
  dplyr::select(
    daily,
    shokai,
    oversea,
    cocurrent,
    dplyr::starts_with("type_")
  ) %>% 
  colnames()

iv_names <- share_data %>% 
  dplyr::select(
    dplyr::starts_with("d_mean_"),
    dplyr::starts_with("d_sd_")
  ) %>% 
  colnames()


fe_names <- share_data %>% 
  dplyr::select(
    year_cz,
    firm_year
  ) %>% 
  colnames()

var_names <- list(
  x_names = x_names,
  iv_names = iv_names,
  fe_names = fe_names
)



```




### Parameter Estimates
#### 1. Estimating $\alpha, \lambda^W, \lambda^F$ and other linear parameters
```{r, results = "asis"}

load(file = "../output/gmm_result_without_share.Rmd")
load("../output/share_data.RData")
load("../output/ptwage_each_market.RData")

tab_nonlinear <- data.frame(
  params = c("alpha", "lambda_W", "lambda_F"),
  coef = result$params_nonlinear,
  se = result$se_nonlinear
)

tab_linear <- data.frame(
  vars = x_names[1:4],
  coef = result$params_linear[x_names[1:4]],
  se = result$se_linear[x_names[1:4]]
)

rownames(tab_nonlinear) <- NULL
rownames(tab_linear) <- NULL

knitr::kable(
  tab_nonlinear,
  col.names = c("Parameter", "Est.", "S.E."),
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Non-linear Parameters"
  ) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_paper("hover", full_width = F)

knitr::kable(
  tab_linear,
  col.names = c("Variables", "Coef.", "S.E."),
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Linear Parameters"
  ) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_paper("hover", full_width = F)


alpha <- result$params_nonlinear[1]
beta <- 1 - alpha
lambda_W <- result$params_nonlinear[2]
lambda_F <- result$params_nonlinear[3]
  
  # Reduced form params
  beta_DW <- (1 + (beta + 2 * (alpha - 1)) / 2 / (2 - alpha - beta)) / lambda_W
  beta_DF <- beta / 2 / (2 - alpha - beta) / lambda_F
  beta_SF <- (1 + (alpha + 2 * (beta - 1)) / 2 / (2 - alpha - beta)) / lambda_F
  beta_SW <- alpha / 2 / (2 - alpha - beta) / lambda_W
  beta_Q_W <- alpha * beta_DW + beta * beta_SW  # = alpha / lambda_W if CRS
  beta_Q_F <- alpha * beta_DF + beta * beta_SF  # = (1 - alpha) / lambda_F if CRS

tab_price <- data.frame(
  vars = c("Net Wage", "Net Fee"),
  coef = c(beta_Q_W, -beta_Q_F),
  els = c(beta_Q_W * mean(share_data$wage_net), -beta_Q_F * mean(share_data$fee_net))
)

knitr::kable(
  tab_price,
  col.names = c("Variables", "Coef.", "Elasticity"),
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Implied Price Impact"
  ) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_paper("hover", full_width = F)

tab_all <- data.frame(
  col1 = c("Nonlinear Parameters", rep("", 2), "Linear Parameters", rep("", 3)),
  col2 = c("$\\alpha$", "$\\lambda^W$", "$\\lambda^F$", x_names[1:4]),
  col3 = round(c(result$params_nonlinear, result$params_linear[1:4]), digits = 3),
  col4 = round(c(result$se_nonlinear, result$se_linear[1:4]), digits = 3)
) 


rownames(tab_all) <- NULL
colnames(tab_all) <- c("", "", "Estimates", "S.E.")

knitr::kable(tab_all, "markdown") %>%
  cat(., file = "../figuretable/gmm_estimation.md")


```

#### 2. Excluding $\alpha$ from the estimation
```{r}
# Not estimating matching param
load(file = "../output/estimation_result/gmm_result_without_share_baseline.Rmd")

tab_nonlinear <- data.frame(
  params = c("lambda_W", "lambda_F"),
  coef = result$params_nonlinear,
  se = result$se_nonlinear
)

tab_linear <- data.frame(
  vars = x_names[1:4],
  coef = result$params_linear[x_names[1:4]],
  se = result$se_linear[x_names[1:4]]
)

rownames(tab_nonlinear) <- NULL
rownames(tab_linear) <- NULL

knitr::kable(
  tab_nonlinear,
  col.names = c("Parameter", "Est.", "S.E."),
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Non-linear Parameters"
  ) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_paper("hover", full_width = F)

knitr::kable(
  tab_linear,
  col.names = c("Variables", "Coef.", "S.E."),
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Linear Parameters"
  ) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_paper("hover", full_width = F)

```

### Decomposing (Semi) Elasticities
```{r}

lambda_W <- result$params_nonlinear[1]
lambda_F <- result$params_nonlinear[2]
alpha <- 0.614
beta <- 0.188

app_els <- data.frame(
  vars = c("Direct (Wage)", "Network (Wage)", "Application (Fee)", "Network (Fee)"),
  vals = c(1 / lambda_W, beta * beta_SW - (1 - alpha) * beta_DW, 1 / lambda_F, alpha * beta_DF - (1 - beta) * beta_SF)
)

match_els <- data.frame(
  vars = c("Direct (Wage)", "Network (Wage)", "Application (Fee)", "Network (Fee)"),
  vals = c(alpha / lambda_W, beta_Q_W - alpha/lambda_W, beta / lambda_F, beta_Q_F - beta / lambda_F)
)

knitr::kable(
  app_els,
  col.names = c("Parameter", "Estimates"),
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Application Semi-Elasticities"
  ) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_paper("hover", full_width = F)

knitr::kable(
  match_els,
  col.names = c("Parameter", "Estimates"),
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Match Semi-Elasticities"
  ) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_paper("hover", full_width = F)

```


# Distribution of Platform Heterogeneity $a_i$
  - Unit: 10K Yen
  - Normalization: Direct employment $a_0=0$
  - This does not depend on the assumption on the matching parameters.
  
### Distribution of $a_i$
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/gmm_model_estimation/heterogeneity_hist.png")
```

### Distribution of Market FE
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/gmm_model_estimation/market_fe_hist.png")
```

### Distribution of Firm FE
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/gmm_model_estimation/firm_fe_hist.png")
```

### Market FE vs Market Size
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/gmm_model_estimation/market_fe_vs_market_size.png")
```


## Marginal Cost

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/gmm_model_estimation/mc_cdf.png")

knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/gmm_model_estimation/mc_hist.png")
```

# Model Fit

```{r}
load("../output/simulated_data.RData")

simdata$match_share_sim <- matching_params[1] * log(simdata$s_W_sim) + matching_params[2] * log(simdata$s_F_sim)


simdata <- simdata %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(id_unique) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(
                   margin_sim = mean(log(wage_sim) - log(fee_sim), ra.rm = T),
                   wage_sim = mean(wage_sim),
                   fee_sim = mean(fee_sim),
                   s_W_sim = mean(s_W_sim),
                   s_F_sim = mean(s_F_sim),
                   match_share_sim = mean(match_share_sim)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::left_join(share_data, by = "id_unique") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(
    margin = log(fee) - log(wage)
  )

r2_wage <- simdata %>% 
  lm(wage ~ wage_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)

r2_fee <- simdata %>% 
  lm(fee ~ fee_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)

r2_margin <- simdata %>% 
  lm(margin ~ margin_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)


r2_match <- simdata %>% 
  lm(y_Q ~ match_share_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)
  
```

### Wage
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_wage`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_hist.png")
```

### Fee
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_fee`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_hist.png")
```

### Margin
- margin = $log(fee)-log(wage)$
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_margin`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin.png")
```

### Match 
- Log of the number of matches relative to outside option $log{(q/q_0)}$
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_match`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match.png")
```

## Aggregate

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_aggregate.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_aggregate.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_aggregate.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_aggregate.png")
```

## Imposing Minimum Wage

```{r}
g1 <- share_data %>% 
  gghistogram(x = "wage_net",
              xlab = "Wage - Parttime Wage (10K Yen per Day)",
              binwidth = 0.1)

g2 <- share_data %>% 
  ggecdf(x = "wage_net",
              xlab = "Wage - Parttime Wage (10K Yen per Day)")

gridExtra::grid.arrange(g1, g2, nrow = 1)
```


### Distribution of Actual Wage - Minimum Wage
```{r}
g1 <- share_data %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(net_wage = wage - mw) %>% 
  gghistogram(x = "net_wage",
              xlab = "Wage - Minimum Wage (10K Yen per Day)",
              binwidth = 0.1)

g2 <- share_data %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(net_wage = wage - mw) %>% 
  ggecdf(x = "net_wage",
              xlab = "Wage - Minimum Wage (10K Yen per Day)")
gridExtra::grid.arrange(g1, g2, nrow = 1)

```

```{r}
load("../output/simulated_data_with_mw.RData")

simdata$match_share_sim <- matching_params[1] * log(simdata$s_W_sim) + matching_params[2] * log(simdata$s_F_sim)


simdata <- simdata %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(id_unique) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(
                   margin_sim = mean(log(wage_sim) - log(fee_sim), ra.rm = T),
                   wage_sim = mean(wage_sim),
                   fee_sim = mean(fee_sim),
                   s_W_sim = mean(s_W_sim),
                   s_F_sim = mean(s_F_sim),
                   match_share_sim = mean(match_share_sim)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::left_join(share_data, by = "id_unique") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(
    margin = log(fee) - log(wage)
  )

r2_wage_mw <- simdata %>% 
  lm(wage ~ wage_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)

r2_fee_mw <- simdata %>% 
  lm(fee ~ fee_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)

r2_margin_mw <- simdata %>% 
  lm(margin ~ margin_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)


r2_match_mw <- simdata %>% 
  lm(y_Q ~ match_share_sim, data = .) %>% 
  summary() %>% 
  .$r.squared %>% 
  round(digits = 3)
  
```


### Wage
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_wage`
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data with minimum wage constraint: `r r2_wage_mw`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_both.png")
```

### Fee
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_fee`
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data with minimum wage constraint: `r r2_fee_mw`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_both.png")
```

### Margin
- margin = $log(fee)-log(wage)$
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_margin`
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data with minimum wage constraint: `r r2_margin_mw`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_both.png")
```

### Match 
- Log of the number of matches relative to outside option $log{(q/q_0)}$
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data: `r r2_match`
- $R^2$ of regressing actual data on simulated data with minimum wage constraint: `r r2_match_mw`

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_both.png")
```

## Aggregate

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_aggregate_both.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_aggregate_both.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_aggregate_both.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_aggregate_both.png")
```


## Taking logs in indirect utilities

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_logutil.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_hist_logutil.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_log.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_hist_log.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_log.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_log.png")
```

## Linear \& log in indirect utilities


```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_linear_and_log.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/wage_hist_linear_and_log.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_linear_and_log.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/fee_hist_linear_and_log.png")
```


```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/margin_linear_and_log.png")
```

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/match_linear_and_log.png")
```


<!-- # Subsampling -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- load("../output/gmm_result_without_share_each_type.Rmd") -->



<!-- lambda_W <- 1:26 -->
<!-- lambda_F <- 1:26 -->
<!-- for (i in 1:26){ -->

<!--   result_i <- result_list[[i]] -->
<!--   if (!is.na(result_i)){ -->
<!--     lambda_W[i] <- min(result_i$params_nonlinear[2], 3) -->
<!--     lambda_F[i] <- min(result_i$params_nonlinear[3], 3) -->
<!--   } else{ -->
<!--     lambda_W[i] <- NA -->
<!--     lambda_F[i] <- NA -->
<!--   } -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- data_lambda <- data.frame(type = worktype_description$description_jp, -->
<!--                         lambda_W = lambda_W, -->
<!--                         lambda_F = lambda_F) -->


<!-- g1 <- data_lambda %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = type, y = lambda_W)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") + coord_flip() + -->
<!--   ylab("lambda_W") + xlab("Work Type") -->


<!-- g2 <- data_lambda %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = type, y = lambda_F)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") + coord_flip() + -->
<!--   ylab("lambda_F") + xlab("Work Type") -->

<!-- gridExtra::grid.arrange(g1, g2, ncol = 2) -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ## Impact of $\alpha$ given $\beta = 0.5$ -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- mc_1_avg <- 1:9 -->
<!-- mc_2_avg <- 1:9 -->
<!-- s_w <- 1:9 -->
<!-- s_f <- 1:9 -->
<!-- semi_els_1 <- 1:9 -->
<!-- semi_els_2 <- 1:9 -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->


<!-- for (i in 1:9){ -->
<!--   alpha <- i * 0.1 -->
<!--   beta <- 0.5 -->
<!--   mc <- mc_func(alpha, beta) -->
<!--   mc_1_avg[i] <- mean(mc$mc_1) -->
<!--   mc_2_avg[i] <- mean(mc$mc_2) -->
<!--   s_w[i] <- mean(mc$s_w) -->
<!--   s_f[i] <- mean(mc$s_f) -->
<!--   semi_els_1[i] <- mean(mc$semi_els_1) -->
<!--   semi_els_2[i] <- mean(mc$semi_els_2) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- temp <- data.frame(alpha = 1:9 * 0.1, -->
<!--            mc_1_avg = mc_1_avg, -->
<!--            mc_2_avg = mc_2_avg, -->
<!--            s_w = s_w, -->
<!--            s_f = s_f, -->
<!--            semi_els_1 = semi_els_1, -->
<!--            semi_els_2 = semi_els_2) -->

<!-- g1 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = s_w)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Share") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Model Implied Worker Share") -->

<!-- g2 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = s_f)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Share") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Model Implied Firm Share") -->

<!-- g3 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = mc_1_avg)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Marginal Cost (10K Yen)") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Marginal Cost Implied by FOC for Wages") -->

<!-- g4 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = mc_2_avg)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Marginal Cost (10K Yen)")+ -->
<!--   ggtitle("Marginal Cost Implied by FOC for Fees") -->

<!-- g5 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = semi_els_1)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Worker Side Semi-elasticity") -->

<!-- g6 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = semi_els_2)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("")+ -->
<!--   ggtitle("Firm Side Semi-elasticity") -->

<!-- gridExtra::grid.arrange(g1, g2, g3, g4, g5, g6, ncol = 2) -->


<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ## Impact of $\beta$ given $\alpha = 0.5$ -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- for (i in 1:9){ -->
<!--   alpha <- 0.5 -->
<!--   beta <- i * 0.1 -->
<!--   mc <- mc_func(alpha, beta) -->
<!--   mc_1_avg[i] <- mean(mc$mc_1) -->
<!--   mc_2_avg[i] <- mean(mc$mc_2) -->
<!--   s_w[i] <- mean(mc$s_w) -->
<!--   s_f[i] <- mean(mc$s_f) -->
<!--   semi_els_1[i] <- mean(mc$semi_els_1) -->
<!--   semi_els_2[i] <- mean(mc$semi_els_2) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- temp <- data.frame(beta = 1:9 * 0.1, -->
<!--            mc_1_avg = mc_1_avg, -->
<!--            mc_2_avg = mc_2_avg, -->
<!--            s_w = s_w, -->
<!--            s_f = s_f, -->
<!--            semi_els_1 = semi_els_1, -->
<!--            semi_els_2 = semi_els_2) -->

<!-- g1 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = beta, y = s_w)) + geom_line() + xlab("beta") + ylab("Share") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Model Implied Worker Share") -->

<!-- g2 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = beta, y = s_f)) + geom_line() + xlab("beta") + ylab("Share") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Model Implied Firm Share") -->

<!-- g3 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = beta, y = mc_1_avg)) + geom_line() + xlab("beta") + ylab("Marginal Cost (10K Yen)") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Marginal Cost Implied by FOC for Wages") -->

<!-- g4 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = beta, y = mc_2_avg)) + geom_line() + xlab("beta") + ylab("Marginal Cost (10K Yen)")+ -->
<!--   ggtitle("Marginal Cost Implied by FOC for Fees") -->

<!-- g5 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = beta, y = semi_els_1)) + geom_line() + xlab("beta") + ylab("") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Worker Side Semi-elasticity") -->

<!-- g6 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = beta, y = semi_els_2)) + geom_line() + xlab("beta") + ylab("")+ -->
<!--   ggtitle("Firm Side Semi-elasticity") -->

<!-- gridExtra::grid.arrange(g1, g2, g3, g4, g5, g6, ncol = 2) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ## Impact of $\alpha$ given $\alpha + \beta = 1$ -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- for (i in 1:9){ -->
<!--   alpha <- i * 0.1 -->
<!--   beta <- 1 - alpha -->
<!--   mc <- mc_func(alpha, beta) -->
<!--   mc_1_avg[i] <- mean(mc$mc_1) -->
<!--   mc_2_avg[i] <- mean(mc$mc_2) -->
<!--   s_w[i] <- mean(mc$s_w) -->
<!--   s_f[i] <- mean(mc$s_f) -->
<!--   semi_els_1[i] <- mean(mc$semi_els_1) -->
<!--   semi_els_2[i] <- mean(mc$semi_els_2) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- temp <- data.frame(alpha = 1:9 * 0.1, -->
<!--            mc_1_avg = mc_1_avg, -->
<!--            mc_2_avg = mc_2_avg, -->
<!--            s_w = s_w, -->
<!--            s_f = s_f, -->
<!--            semi_els_1 = semi_els_1, -->
<!--            semi_els_2 = semi_els_2) -->

<!-- g1 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = s_w)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Share") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Model Implied Worker Share") -->

<!-- g2 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = s_f)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Share") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Model Implied Firm Share") -->

<!-- g3 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = mc_1_avg)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Marginal Cost (10K Yen)") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Marginal Cost Implied by FOC for Wages") -->

<!-- g4 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = mc_2_avg)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("Marginal Cost (10K Yen)")+ -->
<!--   ggtitle("Marginal Cost Implied by FOC for Fees") -->


<!-- g5 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = semi_els_1)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("") + -->
<!--   ggtitle("Worker Side Semi-elasticity") -->

<!-- g6 <- temp %>%  -->
<!--   ggplot(aes(x = alpha, y = semi_els_2)) + geom_line() + xlab("alpha") + ylab("")+ -->
<!--   ggtitle("Firm Side Semi-elasticity") -->

<!-- gridExtra::grid.arrange(g1, g2, g3, g4, g5, g6, ncol = 2) -->
<!-- ``` -->
